release.title: New field added to the Account Details panel.
release.subtitle: This training clip is generated from a real record snapshot, org field labels, and picklist metadata — then rendered as a safe mock UI.
release.closeTitle: Personalized release training without screen-recording a live org.
release.closeSubtitle: Record values, field labels, picklist values, and test notes are interpolated into a reusable CRM mock.

testing: Field appears in the Account Details panel above the fold
Picklist options match the target record type
Existing users can edit and save from the record page
Regression check: Opportunity path and related cards still render
